content:
{"title":"Update API documentation","explanation":"Add authentication endpoints and JWT token usage to the API reference.","diff":"diff --git a/docs/api-reference.md b/docs/api-reference.md
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/docs/api-reference.md
+++ b/docs/api-reference.md
@@ -12,6 +12,32 @@
 ## Endpoints
 
 ### Health Check
+
+### Authentication
+
+All auth endpoints are prefixed with `/auth`.
+
+#### POST /auth/login
+Authenticate a user and receive a JWT token.
+
+**Request Body:**
+| Field | Type | Required |
+|-------|------|----------|
+| email | string | Yes |
+| password | string | Yes |
+
+**Response (200):**
+```json
+{ "token": "eyJhbG...", "expires_in": 3600 }
+```
+
+#### POST /auth/refresh
+Refresh an expiring JWT token. Send the current token in the
+`Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.
+
+#### GET /auth/me
+Returns the authenticated user's profile.
+Requires a valid JWT token in the Authorization header.
"}
